title: Absolute Zero: Reinforced Self-play Reasoning with Zero Data

defines.name: Absolute Zero
defines.definition: A reinforcement learning paradigm in which a model autonomously proposes tasks and learns to solve them without relying on any external data.

defines.name: Absolute Zero Reasoner
defines.definition: A self-evolving reasoning system that uses self-proposed code tasks and verifiable feedback from a code executor to improve reasoning end-to-end.

problem: Existing zero-setting RLVR methods still depend on human-curated question-answer data, limiting scalability and autonomous learning.
